In Trino, an addition to the `ARRAY_FIRST` function has been added, where the 2nd argument can be a predicate to match the returned element.

This allows two use cases:

```sql
ARRAY_FIRST(ARRAY['a', 'b']) -- returns 'a'
```
```sql
ARRAY_FIRST(ARRAY['a', 'b'], x -> x != 'a') -- returns 'b'
```
Reference: https://github.com/trinodb/trino/pull/27706
